svg.text: Six chains active from first cron pass · v0.1.0
Both worker and manager acquire lock on STARTUP
Orphan guard: lock age > 25 min → auto-clear stale
Crash counter: MEDIUM at 3 failures · HIGH at 5
Crons are generic timed pulses — intelligence lives in these 3 files
End of every worker pass → T7
Novel blockers become permanent FM entries — framework compounds
T7a: tool constraints → T7b: schema drift → T7c: lessons → T7d: FMs
Owner writes PA entries before going offline
T2.7: exists · ACTIVE · not expired · scope matches
PA-001 and PA-002 ship inactive — activate before going offline
bootstrap skipped · saves ~5K tokens per pass · no inbound msgs
Read first · ~800 tokens · distilled from SOUL.md
- Prompt injection via fetched web content
- LONGRUNNER next_pass overwrite from external src
If diverges from SOUL.md: SOUL.md wins. Surface to NOTIFICATIONS.
